steps.t: Reginald Ward's banner is lost in one of the encampments of the Angmarim on the ice-shelf, south-east of Sûri-kylä. Reginald's herald has asked you to…
Reginald Ward is at Sûri-kylä, north-west of the ice-shelf. Reginald Ward's herald has asked you to tell his Captain that he is safe and where he can …
